prestazioni: 1HD-FTE (4.2L Turbo Diesel) engine: Full forged internals build with Manley 10.5:1 compression forged pistons, Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and a billet crankshaft from JE Pistons. Pair with a Garrett GTX4509R turbocharger (84mm compressor wheel, .96 A/R turbine housing) for 450whp and 800Nm torque on a custom Link ECU G4X standalone ECU with flex-fuel capability and individual cylinder tuning.

Drivetrain reinforcement: R&D Sport 300M ultra-high-strength driveshafts, Cusco 2-way limited-slip differential (front and rear), and a Tilton triple-plate ceramic clutch with a billet flywheel for the A750F transmission, paired with a PWR Australia 4-core race-spec transmission cooler.

Suspension overhaul: Öhlins TTX46 coilovers with 3-way adjustable damping (compression, rebound, and high/low-speed settings), custom-valved for the J100’s 3-link rear and double-wishbone front geometry. Reinforced with Whiteline adjustable sway bars (24mm front, 22mm rear) and poly bushings, plus SuperPro offset upper control arms for -2.5 degrees of camber gain.
estetica: Widebody conversion: Rocket Bunny V3 J100 kit with carbon fiber fenders (3.5-inch flares), custom front bumper with integrated tow hooks, and a rear diffuser from Seibon Carbon. Matched with a custom 3-piece Work Meister S1 3P wheels (10.5x18 ET0 front, 12x18 ET-12 rear) in gloss black with gold hardware.

Aerodynamic enhancements: Custom carbon fiber hood with dual NACA ducts feeding the Garrett intercooler, paired with a Cusco rear wing (1,200mm span, 300mm chord) on adjustable carbon mounts. Underbody diffusers from Varis Japan with integrated LED lighting for functional downforce.

Interior overhaul: Full Recaro Pole Position seats (carbon fiber shells) with Schroth 6-point harnesses, bolted to a custom roll cage from Custom Cages UK (T45 steel, 3.2mm wall thickness). Dash replaced with a Motec C127 digital dash and a Sparco Pro 2000 steering wheel on a NRG quick-release hub. Full sound deadening with Dynamat Extreme and a custom Alpine iLX-F511 head unit with Focal Utopia Be tweeters and Kicker Solo-Baric L7 subwoofers.
